currentWeek.label: Mar 3–7, 2026

shipped.title: Quo Integration MVP — Live for Premium Painting
shipped.note: First native integration with a third-party estimating platform. Webhooks fire when a Quo call completes, match phone number to a DripJobs customer, fetch the AI summary, and save it as a note on the customer record. · Shipped Mar 3

shipped.title: Zapier — Salesperson Field Regression Fixed
shipped.note: Regression caused the Salesperson field to return null in the Proposal Accepted trigger payload. Resolved and shipped. · Shipped Mar 3

shipped.title: Alternative Payment Instructions — Customer Portal Fix
shipped.note: When Stripe is enabled, alternative payment instructions were not being shown to customers. Now resolved and live. · Shipped Mar 3

shipped.title: Appointments Tab Modal Fix — Contact Record
shipped.note: Modal behavior within the Appointments tab on the Contact Record was broken. Fix confirmed and live. · Shipped Mar 3

shipped.title: False Package Selection Prompt Fix
shipped.note: System was incorrectly prompting users to select a package even when the package toggle was disabled. Fix confirmed and live. · Shipped Mar 3

inFlight.title: Twilio A2P — Missing Privacy Policy & Terms URLs
inFlight.note: A compliance gap in the A2P registration flow. Regulatory implications — should be prioritized.

inFlight.title: Zapier Lead Source Mapping Fix — Superior Attic (#12157)
inFlight.note: Specific tenant can't correctly map lead sources through Zapier. In active development.

inFlight.title: Blast Preview Missing Images (#16194)
inFlight.note: Blast preview failing to render images for a tenant. Customer-facing impact on marketing workflow.

inFlight.title: Users Receiving Notifications Despite Disabled Settings
inFlight.note: Users getting notifications even when explicitly turned off. Assigned to Terry.

currentWeek.strategicQuestion: The Quo Integration is now live with Premium Painting. What data do we need from this pilot — usage, errors, feedback, conversion impact — and over what timeframe, before we greenlight a broader rollout?
currentWeek.strategicMeta: 🚀 Quo MVP pilot active · Premium Painting only · Expansion criteria TBD · Week of Mar 3–7, 2026
